description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and release, using the docker:latest image and a docker:dind service. Add a build-image job in the build stage that runs on runners tagged docker, excludes any branch matching the regex /^wip[\/_-].+$/; it executes docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, then docker build --pull -t ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME} . and docker push ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}, and sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay. Add a release job in the release stage that runs only on the master branch; it runs docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, docker pull ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}, docker tag ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME} ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:latest, and docker push ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:latest, also setting DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay. Both jobs use the docker:dind service for Docker-in-Docker support.
